channel.title: Resolve Me Quickly — Journal
channel.description: Product notes, IT operations, and support automation from ResolveMeQ.

item.title: How AI Is Transforming IT Support in 2025
item.description: A practical look at where AI helps IT desks today—triage, knowledge, and escalation—without pretending the humans go away.

item.title: Reducing Support Costs Without Sacrificing Quality
item.description: Cost cutting that sticks usually comes from fewer round trips and less rework—not from shaving minutes off handle time in a spreadsheet.

item.title: Best Practices for Smart Ticket Routing
item.description: Design routing rules that reflect how work really flows: skills, load, time zones, and the difference between urgency and impact.

item.title: The IT Support Metrics That Matter Most
item.description: A focused set of KPIs that tie the help desk to business outcomes—without drowning leaders in dashboards nobody opens.

item.title: Building an Internal Knowledge Base That Actually Gets Used
item.description: Structure, ownership, and habits that keep articles findable for humans and trustworthy for automation—not another graveyard of PDFs.
